name: Diving Gem Pool Toy 10PCS DISHIO Big Colorful Diamond Diving Toy with Treasure Box Chest Pirate Pool Toys for Kids Toddlers Underwater Sinking Dive Gemstone for Swimming Bath Birthday Party Decoration
bullets: Large Size and Rich Colors: Diving gem pool toys made of acrylic 4cm/1.57inch shiny gems, pirate treasure chest for kid can hold 10pcs large size diving gems with rich colors; and gems weight is enough to sink underwater, which is easily portable for children; sturdy, not easy to break; pool toys is a reliable choice as a bonus gift to encourage diving beginners.

Creativity and Courage: Diving Gems can meet the needs of children of all ages, swimming pool toys encourage toddlers to try diving, older kids can play as mermaids or divers and go dive and get their treasure! or even figure out all kinds of diving games,jewerly dive gems can as a reward system for working together on their certain ideal behaviors.

Attractive and sparkling: Pool gem toys are rich in color and large in size, which can quickly attract the attention of kids. swimming gem toys are bright and large enough to be noticed even in deep water, and in the summer, children and their partners can experience a variety of diving and swimming fun; gems with treasure chest box can also be used as a beach treasure hunt toy.

Widely Uses: Diving gems with gemstone treasure box can be used not only as summer underwater swimming toy, but also for home decoration, desktop decoration, vase decoration, fish tank decoration, swimming pool party,dog swimming training, birthday party, etc.

Repeat Use: Summer swimming gem diving toys set can be placed inside the treasure box or in the pool for a long time, without fading, with bright colors and large enough to be easily found. the gems are big enough to not be a choking hazard

reviews.name: Becky Ledlow
reviews.title: Great toy and price
reviews.body: Such a hit with our son! He earned this reward by working hard to learn how to swim independently and making the swim team. Great price and the material is a sturdy/hard plastic. He loves the colors and putting his gems inside of bags and playing with his sisters. He has yet to actually use them in the pool lol. The small chest is a great option for storing them together, however, ours broke after a big tumble his sister caused. No big deal, but he was bummed she broke his toy he got as a reward. They are versatile as he used them around the house playing and they are meant for water.

reviews.name: Renae DeMatteo
reviews.title: Colorful and fun!
reviews.body: These are perfect! Colorful and fun to play with in the tub or pool! The chest itself had a hinge broken- I did a return- the new one was here the next day!

reviews.name: cheri
reviews.title: Kids Love These Pool Gems!
reviews.body: These are wonderful! The kids absolutely love diving for them in the pool. The treasure chest for storage is adorable, and the gems are big enough that they won’t accidentally go down the drain. Great quality and lots of fun!

reviews.name: B4Me
reviews.title: Cute gems, toddler approved.
reviews.body: The chest broke on day 2, but the gems are solid and should last a long time. They are a bit on the small side but it's nice to have size variation with pool toys (mostly gems and similar shapes made with the same material).
